subscription.title: Subscription Plans
subscription.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for you and enjoy exclusive benefits
subscription.cta_title: Save without giving up good food
subscription.cta_subtitle: The Premium plan is designed for those who want to order food without breaking the budget.
subscription.plan_free_desc: Keep ordering without paying a membership fee. Perfect if you're on a budget.
subscription.plan_free_f1: Access to restaurants and regular promotions
subscription.plan_free_f4: Pay only for what you order
subscription.plan_pro_desc: Spend less on each order and find offers designed to save you money.
subscription.plan_pro_f2: Benefits that often cost less than delivery
subscription.plan_pro_f4: Save more if you order multiple times a month
subscription.plan_pro_f5: Ideal for eating well without overspending
subscription.faq_1_q: Can I change plans at any time?
subscription.faq_1_a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes will take effect on the next billing cycle.
subscription.faq_2_q: What payment methods do you accept?
subscription.faq_2_a: We accept all credit cards, debit cards, bank transfers and digital wallets.
subscription.faq_3_a: Yes, all our paid plans include a 7-day free trial with no commitment.
subscription.faq_4_q: How do I cancel my subscription?
subscription.faq_4_a: You can cancel your subscription at any time from your profile. There are no penalties or additional charges.
subscription.plan_desc: designed to order more for less

help.title: Find quick answers and keep shopping without wasting time.
help.subtitle: Here we group FAQs by topic so users can find solutions on their own or jump to chat for immediate answers.
help.search_placeholder: Search by order, payment, address, restaurant...
help.no_results: No results found with that term. Try "order", "payment", "address" or "restaurant".
help.quick_support_desc: If the answer you are looking for is not here, open the smart chat or enter the corresponding module.

topics_desc.Pedidos_y_pagos: Tracking, confirmation, cancellations and billing issues.

faq_q.¿Cuánto_tiempo_t: How long does an order take?
faq_q.¿Qué_métodos_de: What payment methods do you accept?
faq_q.¿Cómo_cambio_mi: How do I change my address?
faq_q.¿Qué_hago_si_mi: What if my order is wrong?
faq_q.¿Cómo_funciona_: How does the AppiFood Pro subscription work?

faq_a.¿Cuánto_tiempo_t: Delivery time varies by restaurant and your location, usually taking between 30 and 45 minutes.
faq_a.¿Puedo_cancelar: You can cancel before the restaurant accepts it. Once in preparation, you must contact support.
faq_a.¿Qué_métodos_de: We accept credit cards, debit cards, PSE, and cash.
faq_a.¿Cómo_cambio_mi: You can add or modify your addresses from your profile or during checkout.
faq_a.¿Qué_hago_si_mi: Use the chat in the order details to report the problem and we will help you immediately.
faq_a.¿Cómo_funciona_: For a monthly fee, you get free delivery on selected restaurants and exclusive promotions.

supportPage.subtitle: Ask about orders, payments, addresses, subscriptions, or restaurants. If you need to go fast, use the shortcuts or open the chat.
